schemeSubCategory.value: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend
schemeSubCategory.label: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The Post-Doctoral Fellowship (PDF) at the Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) is an initiative to support researchers who have completed or are nearing the completion of their Ph.D. in science or engineering fields. The fellowship offers candidates the opportunity to pursue research in PRL’s cutting-edge science and engineering research areas. The tenure of the fellowship is for a maximum of two years, subject to annual progress reviews. The fellowship provides a competitive stipend, research opportunities, and accommodation benefits.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Fellowship:** Monthly stipend based on the academic status of the fellow: 1. ₹58,000/- for candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis but await the degree. 1. ₹61,000/- for candidates holding a Ph.D. degree. 1. ₹67,000/- for external applicants with a Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience. - **Academic Allowance:** One-time academic allowance of ₹ 10,000/- during the fellowship.- **Accommodation:** Fellows may receive PRL accommodation or HRA in lieu of accommodation as per PRL norms.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The fellowship offers candidates the opportunity to pursue research in PRL’s cutting-edge science & engineering research areas. The tenure of the fellowship is for a maximum of two years, subject to annual progress reviews. The fellowship provides a competitive stipend, research opportunities.

children.text: The Post-Doctoral Fellowship (PDF) at the Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) is an initiative to support researchers who have completed or are nearing the completion of their Ph.D. in science or engineering fields. The fellowship offers candidates the opportunity to pursue research in PRL’s cutting-edge science and engineering research areas. The tenure of the fellowship is for a maximum of two years, subject to annual progress reviews. The fellowship provides a competitive stipend, research opportunities, and accommodation benefits.
Fellowship:
Monthly stipend based on the academic status of the fellow:
₹58,000/- for candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis but await the degree.
₹61,000/- for candidates holding a Ph.D. degree.
₹67,000/- for external applicants with a Ph.D. and at least two years of research experience.
Academic Allowance:
One-time academic allowance of ₹ 10,000/- during the fellowship.
Accommodation:
Fellows may receive PRL accommodation or HRA in lieu of accommodation as per PRL norms.
Step 1:
Eligible candidates are requested to apply via the ONLINE application form provided below.
Step 2:

At the time of the interview, the candidates are required to produce original documents of the following: No Objection Certificate from the employer concerned in respect of those applicants who are employed under Central / State Government / Public Sector Undertakings / Autonomous Bodies.
Links:
Click here to apply online
(All External Applicants to apply via this form ONLY)
Application forms  for PRL SRFs to apply for a PDF fellowship
Application forms for applying for an extension after one year of tenure
Form for submitting the final report

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** Eligible candidates are requested to apply via the ONLINE application form provided below. **Step 2:** At the time of the interview, the candidates are required to produce original documents of the following: No Objection Certificate from the employer concerned in respect of those applicants who are employed under Central / State Government / Public Sector Undertakings / Autonomous Bodies. > **Links:** - [Click here to apply online](https://zfrmz.in/0mYXO8v2lD2Q3lNRlKi6) (All External Applicants to apply via this form ONLY)- [Application forms for PRL SRFs to apply for a PDF fellowship](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/sites/default/files/documents/research-program-doc/Application-forms-for-PRL-SRFS-to-apply-for-a-PDF-fellowship.doc)- [Application forms for applying for an extension after one year of tenure](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/sites/default/files/documents/research-program-doc/Application-forms-for-applying-for-extension-after-one-year-tenure.doc)- [Form for submitting the final report](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/sites/default/files/documents/research-program-doc/Form-for-submitting-the-final-report-2023.doc)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant should complete a Bachelor’s and master’s degrees in science or engineering with first-class (60%) or equivalent grades at both levels. - The applicant’s age should be 35 years.

children.text: The applicant should complete a Bachelor’s and master’s degrees in science or engineering with first-class (60%) or equivalent grades at both levels.
The applicant’s age should be 35 years.
